new_terms.context: Configurations in this range use TEP: tensor parallelism for attention, expert parallelism for MoE layers.
configurations shift to full DEP: attention weights are fully replicated across all GPUs as independent data-parallel ranks, experts are distributed via EP
driven primarily by batch size and its effect on expert activation density.
We collected expert activation ratio versus batch size data while profiling DeepSeek R1
often used together to achieve Pareto optimal performance.
Recipes in this region allocate more prefill nodes than decode (4P1D, 7P2D, 4P3D) to sustain high prefill throughput.
